content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
4 SuperSets Of:
10\10 1DB Bent-Over Rows
30 Sec 2KB Front Rack Hold #2x32/24kg

Metcon:
E03:00MOMx4 Rounds:
15/12 Cals Row
10 Front Squats #50/35kg
*Max Lateral Burpees Over The Bar For The Remaining.

CrossFit Weightlifting
Part 1:
Muscle Snatch
High Hang Snatch
(2+2)2x@50-55%
(1+2)2x@55-60%
(0+2)@60-65%

Part 2:
Hang Squat Snatch above Knee
Hang Squat Snatch Below Knee
4x(1+2)@65-70%
4x(2+1)@70-75%
4x(1+1)@75-85%

Part 3:
Squat Clean
Front Squat
Jerk
5x(2+1+1)@75-80%
5x(1+1+1)@80-90%

Part 4:
6 min EMOM:
2 push Jerks
75-80% from Jerk
